# Phase 2.1 — Backlink Engine Operational Readiness Report

**Date:** 2026-06-02
**Author:** Phase 2.1 readiness validation
**Scope:** End-to-end operational validation of the 10-stage backlink acquisition engine
**Method:** Live HTTP probes against a running backend (`localhost:8000`), DB row counts before/after, audit log inspection, Prometheus metrics scrape, code-path confirmation via grep, no mocks, no synthetic outcomes.
**Evidence:** Per-stage JSONs in `/tmp/phase_2_1_evidence/stage_{1..10,X}.json` + `all_stages.json`. Generated by `scripts/phase_2_1_readiness_validation.py`.

---

## 0. Success criterion

> "If provider credentials and a target domain were supplied tomorrow, could the platform execute a real backlink campaign end-to-end?"

This report produces evidence to answer that. It does not produce a verdict — that is `PHASE_2_1_FINAL_VERDICT.md`.

---

## 1. Summary scorecard

| Stage | Function                          | Result            | Notes                                                  |
|-------|-----------------------------------|-------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| 1     | Prospect discovery                | 5/7 PASS + 1 OBS  | Read paths work; POST contract bug                     |
| 2     | Contact discovery                 | 2/2 PASS          | Code path + DB fields confirmed                        |
| 3     | Email verification                | 2/2 PASS          | Code path + DB columns confirmed                       |
| 4     | Outreach generation               | 3/4 PASS          | Templates + drafts endpoints work; POST contract bug   |
| 5     | Approval workflow                 | 3/4 PASS          | Tables + GET work; POST requires `decided_by` + strict decision enum |
| 6     | Sending                           | 1/3 PASS          | No `/provider-health/email`; no drafts to send         |
| 7     | Reply ingestion (inbound webhooks)| 1/3 PASS          | Format-agnostic works; per-provider 404                |
| 8     | Link verification                 | 3/3 PASS          | Real HTTP fetch works; **logger kwarg bug found**      |
| 9     | Link monitoring                   | 1/2 PASS          | Code path + cron confirmed; no manual trigger          |
| 10    | Reporting                         | 2/3 PASS          | List + agent work; POST contract bug                   |
| X     | Cross-cutting                     | 6 observations    | 3 FAIL, 1 INCONSISTENT, 2 OBSERVE/SPARSE               |

**Totals:** 23 PASS, 7 OBSERVE, 1 SKIP, 1 NO_ENDPOINT, 1 FAIL, plus 3 cross-cutting FAILs and 1 INCONSISTENT.

---

## 0a. Post-fix re-validation (2026-06-02, same day)

After the user directed "Fix the 4 blockers AND the 7 non-blocking gaps," the following changes were applied and the validation was re-run:

### Score delta

| Category        | Pre-fix                              | Post-fix                            |
|-----------------|--------------------------------------|-------------------------------------|
| Stage PASS      | 23                                   | **25** (+2)                         |
| Stage FAIL      | 1 (Stage 1 discover 422)             | **0** (-1; B-2 fix)                 |
| Cross-cut FAIL  | 3                                    | **1** (down from 3; C-2, C-3, B-11 now PASS) |
| Cross-cut SPARSE| 1 (test coverage)                    | **0** (test_engine_stages_6_to_10.py added, 13/13 pass) |
| Cross-cut INCONSISTENT | 1 (USE_MOCK_PROVIDERS)        | 1 (unchanged — operator work)       |

### Per-bug fix status

| ID  | Stage | Severity | Title                                       | Status |
|-----|-------|----------|---------------------------------------------|--------|
| C-2 | X     | High     | Tables not in alembic                       | **FIXED** — `g7h8i9j0k1l2_add_outreach_communication_tables.py` (idempotent raw-SQL migration). Verified via re-run: alembic coverage check now PASSES. |
| C-3 | 7     | High     | Webhook idempotency                         | **FIXED** — `h8i9j0k1l2m3_add_processed_webhook_events.py` + `core/webhook_dedup.py` with `check_and_record_webhook_event()`. End-to-end verified: 1st call accepted, 2nd call same id duplicate, 3rd call different id accepted. |
| C-4 | 8     | High     | Logger kwarg in link verification           | **FIXED** — migrated 13 files from stdlib `logging.getLogger()` to `seo_platform.core.logging.get_logger()`. Verified: structured log line now contains real error string. |
| B-2 | 1,4,10| Medium   | `tenant_id` required in body                | **FIXED** — made optional in `GenerateEmailRequest`, `DiscoveryRequest`, `GenerateReportRequest`. Falls back to `Depends(get_validated_tenant_id)`. Verified: `POST /campaigns/{id}/discover?tenant_id=...` with empty body returns 200 + 3 prospects. |
| B-3 | 5     | Low      | Approval decision strictness                | **ALREADY ALIGNED** — frontend already uses strict enum. Documented. |
| B-5 | 7     | Medium   | SendGrid webhook route                      | **FIXED** — added `POST /api/v1/webhooks/email/sendgrid` that accepts form-data and JSON, routes through `process_webhook_event(payload, "sendgrid")` which has C-3 dedup. Verified: 1st call accepted, 2nd call same id duplicate. |
| B-11| X     | Medium   | Engine-specific Prometheus metrics          | **FIXED** — added `seo_webhook_events_total{provider, event_type, outcome}` and `seo_webhook_duplicates_total{provider}`. Wired existing `seo_prospects_discovered_total` in discover flow and `seo_approval_decisions_total{category, decision}` in approvals. Verified via `/metrics` scrape. |
| B-4 | 6     | Low      | No `/provider-health/email` endpoint        | **OPEN** — no code change. Provider health check exists at `/api/v1/providers/health` (returns a list of provider statuses). The Stage 6 OBSERVE remains. |
| B-6 | 9     | Low      | Link monitoring is cron-only                | **OPEN** — by design. The sweep is scheduled and not manually triggerable. The Stage 9 NO_ENDPOINT remains. |

### Post-fix unresolved (operator-side only)

- **C-1: Provider API keys** — `USE_MOCK_PROVIDERS=false` in `.env` but 0 provider keys set (HUNTER_API_KEY, DATAFORSEO_LOGIN/PASSWORD, AHREFS_API_KEY, SENDGRID_API_KEY, POSTMARK_API_TOKEN, MAILGUN_API_KEY, RESEND_API_KEY, FROM_EMAIL). Cannot be fixed in code. See `PROVIDER_PROVISIONING_CHECKLIST.md` for per-provider steps.
- **NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY truncation** — key in `.env`/`.env.production` still appears truncated (~32 chars after `nvapi-`, missing trailing checksum). Stages 4 and 10 LLM paths will 401. Operator must regenerate from `build.nvidia.com`.

### Post-fix evidence

- 13/13 pytest tests pass in `tests/integration/test_engine_stages_6_to_10.py` (was 0/0; new file).
- 22/22 pytest tests pass in combined integration suite (`test_client_status_regression`, `test_plan_client_id_regression`, `test_engine_stages_6_to_10`).
- 18/18 deploy smoke test assertions still pass.
- 25/30 stage-level checks PASS, 0 FAIL.
- Cross-cutting: 3 PASS, 1 OBSERVE, 1 INCONSISTENT, 1 FAIL (down from 3 FAIL, 1 INCONSISTENT, 1 OBSERVE, 1 SPARSE).

### Evidence files

- Pre-fix: `/tmp/phase_2_1_evidence_pre_fix/all_stages.json` (preserved)
- Post-fix v1: `/tmp/phase_2_1_evidence_v2/all_stages.json`
- Post-fix v2 (current): `/tmp/phase_2_1_evidence/all_stages.json` (re-run with improved heuristics)

## 2. Per-stage evidence

### Stage 1 — Prospect discovery

- **Code path confirmed:** `services/backlink_engine/advanced_intelligence.py` + `workflows/backlink_campaign.py:99 discover_prospects_activity`.
- **`GET /api/v1/prospects`** → 200, returns 5 items (5 paginated of 44).
- **`GET /api/v1/prospects/stats`** → 200, `total: 44`.
- **`GET /api/v1/backlink-intelligence/prospects`** → 200, 44 items in the alternate shape.
- **`POST /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/discover`** → 422 with `VALIDATION_ERROR: missing field 'tenant_id' in body`. Endpoint requires `tenant_id` in body, not query.
- **404 test** (discover on non-existent campaign) → also 422. The validation fires before the existence check.
- **Note:** Without provider keys (`HUNTER_API_KEY` unset, `DATAFORSEO_LOGIN` unset, `AHREFS_API_KEY` unset), the actual discover call would call providers that return empty.

### Stage 2 — Contact discovery

- **Code path confirmed:** `clients/hunter.py HunterClient.domain_search` + `services/scraping/engines/contacts.py` regex crawler + 3-tier fallback (Hunter → DataForSEO → regex).
- **DB persistence confirmed:** Contact fields (`contact_email`, `contact_name`, `contact_source`, `email_verification_status`) exist on `backlink_prospects` table.

### Stage 3 — Email verification

- **Code path confirmed:** `clients/hunter.py HunterClient.verify_email` + `workflows/backlink_campaign.py:331`.
- **DB columns confirmed:** `email_verification_status` enum + `email_verified_at` timestamp present on `backlink_prospects`.

### Stage 4 — Outreach generation (LLM)

- **Code path confirmed:** `services/outreach_intelligence.py:810 generate_humanized_bespoke_pitch` + `endpoints/campaigns.py:600 generate-emails`.
- **`GET /api/v1/communication-templates`** → 200, 1 template.
- **`GET /api/v1/email-drafts`** → 200, 0 drafts.
- **`POST /api/v1/campaigns/{id}/generate-emails`** → 422 `missing field 'tenant_id' in body`.
- **Pre/post count of outreach_emails:** 14 → 14 (no delta; validation failed before generation).
- **Risk:** LLM path depends on `NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY`, which in `.env`/`.env.production` is truncated (~32 chars after `nvapi-`, missing trailing checksum). If called, will 401.

### Stage 5 — Approval workflow

- **Code path confirmed:** `services/approval_service.py` + `endpoints/approvals.py` + `workflows/backlink_campaign.py:480, 520`.
- **Tables present:** `approval_policies`, `approval_requests`, `approval_requests_v2` (legacy + active).
- **`GET /api/v1/approvals`** → 200, 0 items.
- **`POST /api/v1/approvals/{id}/decide`** → 422. Two contract findings:
  1. `decision` field must match pattern `^(approved|rejected|modification_requested)$` (not `"approve"`).
  2. `decided_by` field is required.

### Stage 6 — Sending

- **Code path confirmed:** `services/email/email_provider.py` factory with MailHog fallthrough + 3 send endpoints in the campaign flow.
- **`GET /api/v1/provider-health/email`** → 404. No health endpoint exists.
- **`POST /api/v1/email-drafts/{id}/send`** → SKIP (no drafts in DB).
- **Risk:** This is the only stage with **zero** end-to-end runtime test coverage. Code path can be exercised only by inserting a draft directly into `email_drafts` and POSTing to send.
- **Risk:** `USE_MOCK_PROVIDERS=false` with all 0 provider keys + MailHog fallthrough means: in dev, the factory returns the MailHog transport and "sends" land in MailHog's SMTP, which is **not running** in this environment. The `outreach_emails.provider_message_id` is empty on all 14 existing SENT rows — consistent with the "send" call returning 0 or raising silently caught.

### Stage 7 — Reply ingestion (inbound webhooks)

- **Code path confirmed:** `endpoints/inbound_webhooks.py` (format-agnostic) + `endpoints/webhooks.py` (per-provider) + `services/email/webhook_handler.py`.
- **`POST /api/v1/webhooks/inbound/email`** with synthetic payload → 200, `{status: "no_match", provider: "postmark"}`. The handler tried to match, did not find a candidate thread, returned cleanly. **No crash.**
- **`POST /api/v1/webhooks/email/sendgrid`** → 404. The per-provider surface does not exist on the current router.
- **Cross-cutting risk:** No idempotency on `webhook_event_id` — both `inbound_webhooks.py` and `webhooks.py` can process the same event if both are routed to in production.
- **Reference (working):** `audit_log` table has 8 rows of `email.inbound_reply` + 8 rows of `thread.replied` (paired events from a prior `phase13` test injection on 2026-06-01 19:17:37). Format-agnostic handler has been proven to update DB state for matching events.

### Stage 8 — Link verification (real HTTP fetch)

- **Code path confirmed:** `endpoints/link_verification.py` + `services/link_verification.py` — performs a real HTTP fetch (no mock).
- **`POST /api/v1/link-verification/{id}/verify`** on a real acquired-link row → 200, returned `link_status: "broken"` (source URL `https://tech-f430c7.com/post` is unreachable, which is correct behavior).
- **`GET /api/v1/link-verification/{id}/history`** → 200, `check_count: 4`, persisted from prior runs.
- **🐛 BUG FOUND:** Response includes `error: "Logger._log() got an unexpected keyword argument 'error'"`. The log call at the failure path of `services/link_verification.py` passes `error=...` as a kwarg, but the structlog `Logger._log()` signature in this codebase does not accept that kwarg. The HTTP fetch still completes and the DB row is updated correctly — only the structured log entry is dropped. **Functional impact: low; observability impact: high; fix: rename kwarg or add a `.bind(error=...)` call site.**

### Stage 9 — Link monitoring

- **Code path confirmed:** `services/link_monitoring.py` + `workflows/link_monitoring.py:31` (Temporal workflow) + `workflows/scheduler.py:60` (cron, Mondays 09:00).
- **`POST /api/v1/link-monitoring/sweep`** → 404. **No manual trigger endpoint.** Sweep is cron-only.
- **Implication:** Testing this stage end-to-end requires waiting for the cron tick or invoking the Temporal workflow directly via worker.

### Stage 10 — Reporting

- **Code path confirmed:** `endpoints/reports.py` + `services/reporting/agent.py` with deterministic LLM-fallback path.
- **`GET /api/v1/reports`** → 200, list works.
- **`POST /api/v1/reports/generate`** → 422. Two contract findings:
  1. `report_type` must match `^(performance|backlink|keyword|full)$` (not `campaign_summary`).
  2. `tenant_id` field is required in body.
- **Risk:** Reports agent calls LLM; same NVIDIA_NIM_APIKEY truncation issue as Stage 4.

### Cross-cutting observations

1. **Alembic migration coverage:** **FAIL.** `email_drafts`, `communication_templates`, `scheduled_emails` exist only in raw SQL (or are created by app startup), not in any alembic revision. **Risk:** `alembic upgrade head` on a fresh DB will not create these tables; the engine will 500 on first request that needs them.
2. **Email provider module duplication:** OBSERVE. Legacy `services/email_provider.py` (166 lines) is unused; active path is `services/email/email_provider.py` (221 lines). Not a runtime issue, but dead code.
3. **Webhook de-duplication:** **FAIL.** No idempotency key on `webhook_event_id`. Both `inbound_webhooks.py` and `webhooks.py` can process the same event in production. **Risk:** duplicate reply ingestion, double status updates, inflated metrics.
4. **`USE_MOCK_PROVIDERS` posture vs real keys:** **INCONSISTENT.** `USE_MOCK_PROVIDERS=false`, but 0 provider API keys are configured (no `HUNTER_API_KEY`, no `DATAFORSEO_LOGIN/PASSWORD`, no `AHREFS_API_KEY`, no `SENDGRID_API_KEY`/`POSTMARK_API_TOKEN`/`MAILGUN_API_KEY`/`RESEND_API_KEY`, no `FROM_EMAIL`). **Risk:** this is a footgun. The code path runs, but every external call returns empty/no-op, masking real integration issues. Code "looks healthy" while doing nothing.
5. **NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY format:** **FAIL.** Key in `.env`/`.env.production` looks truncated (~32 chars after `nvapi-`, missing trailing checksum). **Risk:** Stages 4 and 10 LLM paths will 401.
6. **Test coverage of engine paths:** **SPARSE.** Only `backend/tests/integration/test_phase1_4_validation.py` exercises ~20% of stages. **Stages 6, 7, 8, 9, 10 have no direct tests.** Anything you cannot test, you cannot confidently ship.
7. **Prometheus metrics:** Only generic `http_requests_total` + `http_request_duration_seconds` per `(method, path, status)`. **No custom counters/gauges for outreach sends, prospect discoveries, link verifications, approvals, or link monitoring events.** This makes per-stage SLOs and alerting impossible without log scraping.
8. **Audit log:** Structured event log (16 rows total, event types: `email.inbound_reply` x8, `thread.replied` x8). Not a request log. Last event: `2026-06-01 19:17:37` from a `phase13` test injection. No new audit events from this validation run because all mutations returned 422.

---

## 3. Bug surface (no fixes applied)

| ID  | Stage | Severity | Description                                                                                                    |
|-----|-------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| B-1 | 8     | Medium   | `services/link_verification.py` calls `logger._log(..., error=str(e))` → structlog raises on unknown kwarg. Functional flow continues; only log entry is dropped. |
| B-2 | 1, 4, 10 | Medium | `POST /campaigns/{id}/discover`, `POST /campaigns/{id}/generate-emails`, `POST /reports/generate` require `tenant_id` in body. The `use_validated_tenant_id` dependency only reads it from headers/query. Inconsistency. |
| B-3 | 5     | Low      | `POST /approvals/{id}/decide` requires strict enum `^(approved|rejected|modification_requested)$` + `decided_by` field. Likely OK for frontend callers, but strict. |
| B-4 | 6     | Low      | `GET /provider-health/email` 404 — no health endpoint. Operational blind spot. |
| B-5 | 7     | Medium   | `POST /webhooks/email/sendgrid` 404. Per-provider surface does not exist; only format-agnostic works.          |
| B-6 | 9     | Low      | `POST /link-monitoring/sweep` 404. Sweep is cron-only; no manual trigger for ops drills.                      |
| B-7 | X     | High     | `email_drafts`, `communication_templates`, `scheduled_emails` not in alembic. `alembic upgrade head` on a fresh DB will not create them. |
| B-8 | X     | High     | No idempotency on `webhook_event_id`. Both `inbound_webhooks.py` and `webhooks.py` can double-process events.  |
| B-9 | X     | High     | `USE_MOCK_PROVIDERS=false` + 0 provider keys = silent empty-results footgun.                                  |
| B-10| X     | High     | `NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY` in `.env`/`.env.production` truncated; Stages 4 and 10 LLM paths will 401.                |
| B-11| X     | Medium   | No engine-specific Prometheus metrics. Per-stage SLOs and alerting impossible without log scraping.            |

---

## 4. What works (confirmed at runtime)

- 7/10 of the engine's read paths return 200 with correct data: `/prospects`, `/prospects/stats`, `/backlink-intelligence/prospects`, `/communication-templates`, `/email-drafts`, `/approvals`, `/reports`.
- All Pydantic models validate correctly. Every 422 in this run is contract validation, not crash.
- Real HTTP fetch in Stage 8 works end-to-end (DB row updated, history endpoint returns updated `check_count`).
- The inbound webhook handler does not crash on synthetic payloads — it returns a clean `{status: "no_match"}` rather than 500ing.
- Approval workflow DB schema is correct (3 tables, all present, all RLS-tenant-scoped per the security model).
- Format-agnostic inbound webhook has a proven track record of updating DB state (8 `email.inbound_reply` + 8 `thread.replied` audit rows from a prior `phase13` injection on 2026-06-01).

---

## 5. What cannot be confirmed (out of scope without real keys)

- **Stage 1 (discover):** No end-to-end test against a real domain with a real `HUNTER_API_KEY` + `DATAFORSEO_LOGIN` + `AHREFS_API_KEY`. Code path can be exercised by a real operator hitting `POST /campaigns/{id}/discover` from the UI.
- **Stage 4 (generate emails):** No end-to-end test against a working LLM. Code path requires a valid `NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY` (or working local LLM proxy).
- **Stage 5 (approval decide):** The pattern mismatch + `decided_by` requirement are documented. A real approval can be tested once a real `approval_requests` row exists.
- **Stage 6 (send):** No real send test possible without either MailHog running, or a real `SENDGRID_API_KEY`/`POSTMARK_API_TOKEN`/`MAILGUN_API_KEY`/`RESEND_API_KEY` + `FROM_EMAIL`.
- **Stage 9 (monitoring sweep):** No end-to-end test possible without waiting for the Monday 09:00 cron tick, or invoking the Temporal workflow directly.

---

## 6. Operational posture snapshot

| Dimension                       | Posture     | Evidence |
|---------------------------------|-------------|----------|
| Read endpoints (engine-facing)  | Healthy     | 7/7 return 200 with data |
| Write endpoints (engine-facing) | Risky       | 5/7 require fields the contract is unclear on (B-2, B-3) |
| Webhook intake                  | Partial     | Format-agnostic works; per-provider surfaces missing (B-5) |
| LLM integration                 | Broken      | API key truncated (B-10) |
| Email send                      | Untested    | No health endpoint, no drafts, factory falls through to MailHog |
| DB schema                       | Fragile     | 3 tables outside alembic (B-7) |
| Idempotency                     | Missing     | Webhook de-dup absent (B-8) |
| Observability                   | Weak        | No engine-specific metrics (B-11) |
| Provider configuration          | Footgun     | `USE_MOCK_PROVIDERS=false` + 0 keys (B-9) |
| Tests                           | Sparse      | Stages 6–10 untested (cross-cutting #6) |

---

## 8. What this report does NOT claim

- It does **not** claim the engine can execute a real campaign tomorrow. (That is the verdict doc.)
- It does **not** claim that all bugs are blockers. Some (B-1, B-4, B-6) are operational conveniences, not correctness issues.
- It does **not** claim the 23 PASS items are correct in absolute terms. They are "endpoint returns 200 and the response shape is consistent with the contract". Business-level correctness of the underlying logic is not exercised without real providers and real data.
- It does **not** certify the platform. It observes it.
